services.name: payments-api
services.description: Core payments processing API; issues and validates OAuth2 client-credential tokens for downstream calls and is the tier-1 system of record for payment state

services.name: transfer-service
services.description: Money transfer orchestration; enforces request idempotency via an Idempotency-Key header so a retried transfer request never double-moves funds

services.name: notifications-pipeline
services.description: Delivery pipeline with exponential-backoff-and-jitter retries and a dead-letter queue for deliveries that exhaust their retry budget

services.name: api-gateway
services.description: Edge gateway enforcing per-API-key token-bucket rate limiting backed by Redis, shared across all gateway replicas

services.name: fraud-scoring
services.description: Real-time fraud scoring with a p99 latency SLO and a conservative rule-based fallback when the scoring path can't answer within budget

services.name: identity-provider
services.description: Issues and rotates OAuth2 client-credential tokens for internal services; supports zero-downtime rotation via a dual-secret overlap window

services.name: legacy-batch-runner
services.description: Deprecated nightly batch job with no current owner; scheduled for decommission once its last downstream consumer migrates off
